task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Rocket.Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main interface is visible, showing the channel sidebar and user interface, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the #release-updates channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The channel header or the active highlighted channel in the left sidebar clearly shows 'release-updates'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the original Release 8.0.0 message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The message 'Rocket.Chat Release 8.0.0 is now available. This is a major update with significant performance improvements.' is visible in the chat history.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the edit interface for the target message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The message text box shows the original message text in an editable state, or the message action menu is open with 'Edit' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the message was successfully edited to the new warning text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chat history shows the message now reads '**WARNING**: Release 8.0.0 has been pulled due to a critical bug. Do not upgrade.' and it should have an 'edited' indicator (like a pencil icon or timestamp) next to it.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Rocket.Chat GUI to perform the actions, not terminal API commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Rocket.Chat graphical user interface being interacted with (mouse clicks, typing in the UI) rather than a terminal window executing cURL commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually edited the existing message rather than deleting it and sending a new one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final message in the chat history must have an 'edited' tag or pencil icon next to it. There should be no evidence of the original message being deleted and a completely new message being posted.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat interface (sidebar, message input, channel header) is clearly visible and matches the expected layout of the application, rather than text typed into a generic text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target channel: 'release-updates'. Original message text to locate: 'Rocket.Chat Release 8.0.0 is now available. This is a major update with significant performance improvements.'. Expected edited message text must contain: 'Release 8.0.0 has been pulled due to a critical bug. Do not upgrade.'.
